case_title: CHANDAR PANDEY VS. PHILIPPINE AIR LINE, INCORPORATED

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT PHILIPPINE AIR LINE, INCORPORATED
